name: NoibuSessionReplay
summary: Noibu Session Replay SDK for iOS.
description:
NoibuSessionReplay captures user sessions, network activity, and UI
interactions for Noibu's error and experience analytics platform.
Distributed as a self-contained XCFramework — no other pod
dependencies are required.

script_phases.name: Embed dynamic coreKit (simulator only)
script_phases.script:
set -euo pipefail
  if [[ "${EFFECTIVE_PLATFORM_NAME:-}" != "-iphonesimulator" ]]; then
    echo "coreKit embed: skipping (device build)"
    exit 0
  fi
  COREKIT_SRC="${PODS_ROOT}/NoibuSessionReplay/coreKit.xcframework/ios-arm64_x86_64-simulator/coreKit.framework"
  COREKIT_DEST="${TARGET_BUILD_DIR}/${FRAMEWORKS_FOLDER_PATH}"
  if [[ ! -d "${COREKIT_SRC}" ]]; then
    echo "warning: coreKit simulator slice not found at ${COREKIT_SRC}"
    exit 0
  fi
  mkdir -p "${COREKIT_DEST}"
  rsync -a --delete "${COREKIT_SRC}" "${COREKIT_DEST}/"
  echo "coreKit embed: copied to ${COREKIT_DEST}/coreKit.framework"
